name: 李克 (Li Kui)
notes: Helped select ministers; famous for five criteria of judging character

name: 西门豹 (Ximen Bao)
notes: Appointed to govern Ye, brought good administration to Henei

name: 田子方 (Tian Zifang)
notes: Teacher of Marquis Wen's son, taught by Zi Xia

name: 魏成子 (Wei Chengzi)
notes: Became prime minister under Marquis Wen

name: 翟璜 (Zhai Huang)
notes: Recommended many capable men to Marquis Wen

name: 庞涓 (Pang Juan)
notes: Wei general killed at Battle of Maling

name: 太子申 (Crown Prince Shen)
notes: Captured by Qi at Battle of Mailing

name: 信陵君无忌 (Lord Xinling, Wuji)
notes: Son of King Zhao, saved Zhao from Qin, led five states against Qin

name: 唐雎 (Tang Ju)
notes: At age 90+, persuaded Qin to send troops to save Wei

name: 范痤 (Fan Cuo)
notes: Wei nearly executed him for Zhao's offer of land

name: 芒卯 (Mang Mao)
notes: Wei general, fled after defeat by Qin

name: 段干子 (Duangan Zi)
notes: Proposed ceding Nanyang to Qin for peace
